purpose: Curated Claude Code extension library — 22 skills, 11 slash commands, 5 agents, linter configs for 6 languages, 3 project templates
structure: skills/ — skill .md files by domain | .claude/commands/ — slash commands | .claude/agents/ — 5 agents | tools/ — linter/formatter configs | templates/ — project scaffolds | mcp/ — MCP server for memory+history
conventions: Skill: YAML frontmatter (name, description) + When-to-Activate + comparison table + Checklist. Agent: frontmatter (name, description, tools, model, color) + system prompt in 2nd person, min tools principle
canonical_format: Read skills/api-design and skills/claude-api first — they define the reference format for all skills
workflow: make format (prettier on all md) | make lint (markdownlint) | make setup TARGET=<path> LANG=<python|node|go|rust|svelte|typescript>
gotchas: MCP tools (save_history, load_memory etc) not in deferred tool list during sessions — write directly to .mcp_history.json if /mem_save needed. Stop hook payload may not include transcript_path — verify if auto-save fires correctly on exit.
next_up: Verify Stop hook fires correctly on session end. Consider structured summary format for history chunks. Split memory keys further if project grows.
